sentences.target: J’écris dans la marge pour m’aider.

translations.fr: J’écris dans la marge pour m’aider.
translations.en: I write in the margin to help me.
translations.es: Escribo en el margen para ayudarme.
translations.de: Ich schreibe am Rand, um mir zu helfen.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在页边空白处写字来帮助自己。
translations.ru: Я пишу на полях, чтобы помочь себе.
translations.pt: Escrevo na margem para me ajudar.
translations.he: אני כותב בשוליים כדי לעזור לעצמי.
translations.tr: Kendime yardımcı olmak için sayfanın kenarına yazıyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi viết vào lề để tự giúp mình.
translations.nl: Ik schrijf in de marge om mezelf te helpen.
translations.uk: Я пишу на полях, щоб допомогти собі.
translations.hu: A margóra írok, hogy segítsek magamnak.
translations.hi: मैं अपनी मदद के लिए हाशिये में लिखता हूँ.
translations.pl: Piszę na marginesie, żeby sobie pomóc.
translations.el: Γράφω στο περιθώριο για να βοηθήσω τον εαυτό μου.
translations.nb: Jeg skriver i margen for å hjelpe meg selv.
translations.id: Saya menulis di tepi halaman untuk membantu diri saya.
translations.sv: Jag skriver i marginalen för att hjälpa mig själv.
translations.ro: Scriu în margine ca să mă ajut.
translations.cs: Píšu do okraje, abych si pomohl.
translations.da: Jeg skriver i margen for at hjælpe mig selv.
translations.ja: 自分を助けるために余白に書く。

tokens.explanation: Subject clitic pronoun, 1st person singular, elided before a vowel-initial verb; functions as the subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; denotes the action of writing.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase ('dans la marge').
Definite article, feminine singular; agrees with 'marge' as the head noun.
Common noun, feminine; here the page margin (layout), head of the NP complement to 'dans'.
Preposition introducing an infinitival purpose clause ('pour m’aider' = in order to help me).
Clitic object/reflexive pronoun, 1st person singular, elided before vowel; object of the infinitive 'aider'.
Infinitive verb governed by 'pour'; expresses purpose ('to help').

sentences.target: Tu règles la marge à deux centimètres.
sentences.reading: /ty ʁɛɡl la maʁʒ a dø sɑ̃timɛtʁ/

translations.fr: Tu règles la marge à deux centimètres.
translations.ipa: /ty ʁɛɡl la maʁʒ a dø sɑ̃timɛtʁ/
translations.en: You set the margin to two centimeters.
translations.es: Ajustas el margen a dos centímetros.
translations.de: Du stellst den Rand auf zwei Zentimeter ein.
translations.it: Imposti il margine a due centimetri.
translations.zh-Hans: 你把页边距设为两厘米。
translations.yue: 你將頁邊距設為兩厘米。
translations.ru: Ты устанавливаешь поля на два сантиметра.
translations.pt: Você ajusta a margem para dois centímetros.
translations.he: אתה מגדיר את השוליים לשני סנטימטרים.
translations.vi: Bạn đặt lề thành hai xăng-ti-mét.
translations.nl: Je stelt de marge in op twee centimeter.
translations.uk: Ти встановлюєш поля на два сантиметри.
translations.hi: तुम मार्जिन को दो सेंटीमीटर पर सेट करते हो.
translations.el: Ρυθμίζεις το περιθώριο στα δύο εκατοστά.
translations.nb: Du setter margen til to centimeter.
translations.id: Kamu mengatur margin menjadi dua sentimeter.
translations.sv: Du ställer in marginalen på två centimeter.
translations.da: Du indstiller margen til to centimeter.
translations.ja: 余白を2センチに設定する。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; means to set/adjust.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'marge'.
Common noun, feminine; refers to page/layout margin as a measurable setting.
Preposition introducing the target value of the setting ('à deux centimètres').
Cardinal numeral modifying the unit noun 'centimètres'.
Unit noun, plural; measure complement specifying the value of the margin.

sentences.target: On baisse la marge sur ces baskets.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ bɛs la maʁʒ syʁ se baskɛt/

translations.fr: On baisse la marge sur ces baskets.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ bɛs la maʁʒ syʁ se baskɛt/
translations.en: We’re lowering the margin on these sneakers.
translations.es: Estamos bajando el margen de beneficio en estas zapatillas.
translations.de: Wir senken die Gewinnspanne bei diesen Sneakers.
translations.it: Abbassiamo il margine di profitto su queste sneakers.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在降低这些运动鞋的利润率。
translations.yue: 我哋減低呢啲波鞋嘅利潤率。
translations.ru: Мы снижаем маржу на эти кроссовки.
translations.pt: Estamos reduzindo a margem de lucro nestes tênis.
translations.he: אנחנו מורידים את שולי הרווח על הנעליים האלה.
translations.tr: Bu spor ayakkabılardaki kâr marjını düşürüyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang giảm biên lợi nhuận trên những đôi giày thể thao này.
translations.ar: نحن نخفض هامش الربح على هذه الأحذية الرياضية.
translations.nl: We verlagen de marge op deze sneakers.
translations.uk: Ми знижуємо маржу на ці кросівки.
translations.hu: Csökkentjük ezeknek a tornacipőknek az árrést.
translations.hi: हम इन जूतों पर लाभ का मार्जिन कम कर रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Obniżamy marżę na te buty sportowe.
translations.el: Μειώνουμε το περιθώριο κέρδους σε αυτά τα αθλητικά παπούτσια.
translations.nb: Vi senker marginen på disse joggeskoene.
translations.id: Kami menurunkan margin keuntungan pada sepatu kets ini.
translations.sv: Vi sänker marginalen på de här sneakersen.
translations.ro: Reducem marja de profit la acești adidași.
translations.da: Vi sænker marginen på disse sneakers.
translations.ja: このスニーカーの利益率を下げています。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/colloquial subject pronoun meaning 'we/they/one', 3rd person singular agreement.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; means to reduce/decrease.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'marge'.
Common noun, feminine; here commercial/profit margin that is being reduced.
Preposition introducing the item/category the margin applies to ('sur ces baskets').
Demonstrative determiner, plural, modifying 'baskets'.
Plural common noun; footwear item, object of the preposition 'sur'.

sentences.target: Il reste une petite marge d’erreur.

translations.fr: Il reste une petite marge d’erreur.
translations.en: There’s a small margin of error.
translations.es: Queda un pequeño margen de error.
translations.it: Resta un piccolo margine di errore.
translations.zh-Hans: 仍有一小部分误差空间。
translations.pt: Ainda há uma pequena margem de erro.
translations.vi: Vẫn còn một khoảng sai số nhỏ.
translations.nl: Er blijft een kleine foutmarge over.
translations.hi: एक छोटी त्रुटि की गुंजाइश बची है.
translations.sv: Det finns en liten felmarginal kvar.
translations.ro: Rămâne o mică marjă de eroare.
translations.da: Der er en lille fejlmargin tilbage.
translations.ja: 誤差の余地が少し残っている。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun; here used impersonally/existentially ('il reste...').
Intransitive verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; forms an existential construction ('there remains').
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'marge'.
Adjective, feminine singular; modifies 'marge'.
Common noun, feminine; here 'allowance/room' in the fixed expression 'marge d’erreur'.
Preposition 'de' elided before a vowel; introduces a genitive-like complement ('d’erreur').
Common noun, feminine; head of the complement to form 'marge d’erreur' (margin of error).
